nasb.text: “Take a census of the descendants of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, by their families, by their fathers’ households,

esv.text: “Take a census of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, by their clans and their fathers’ houses,

cnv.text: “你要從利未人中，登記哥轄子孫的總數，照著他們的家族、父家，

ccb.text: “你要按宗族和家系统计利未人中哥辖子孙的人数，
